datasets.name: ESP32_RS485_Modbus
datasets.description: Simulated Modbus RTU sensor data over RS485

datasets.name: MCP2515_CAN_Bus
datasets.description: Simulated CAN bus messages from vehicle/industrial system

usage_instructions: Use these files with: python tools/data_analyzer.py --input data/demo_samples/esp32_rs485_demo.csv
Or for CAN data: python tools/data_analyzer.py --input data/demo_samples/mcp2515_can_demo.csv
Files simulate real serial monitor output from PlatformIO projects
